remarks: Timeless elegance is found in this 1929 Center Hall Colonial, beautifully situated in the Bettswood area of Norwalk, CT. Rich in character, this exceptional home features hardwood floors throughout, gracious living spaces and impeccable craftsmanship. The grand living room with a classic fireplace, flows seamlessly into the sun-filled sunroom, while the formal dining room leads to a charming screened-in porch, ideal for morning coffee, al fresco dining, or a warm summer evening. The fully remodeled chef's kitchen is the heart of the home, featuring a large center island, marble counters and custom cabinetry, Wolf range and microwave, Bosch dishwasher, KitchenAid refrigerator, breakfast nook with built-ins and two spacious pantries. Just off the kitchen, a versatile den provides the perfect space for a home office, library, or cozy family room and a hall bath for guests makes entertaining a breeze. Upstairs, the spacious primary suite includes a full bath and access to a private patio. Three additional bedrooms and a full bath complete the second floor. The lower level offers an abundance of storage space, laundry room and access to the attached 2-car garage. Ideally located just a short stroll to the Town Green and vibrant Wall Street District, this home offers exceptional convenience with easy access to I-95, Route 7, the Merritt Parkway, Metro-North, shopping and dining. Combining historic charm and an unbeatable location, this truly one-of-a-kind home is not to be missed.
